  • Uses of ConstraintViolation in io.fluxzero.sdk.tracking.handling.validation

    Methods in io.fluxzero.sdk.tracking.handling.validation that return types with arguments of type ConstraintViolation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Set<ConstraintViolation<?>>
    ValidationUtils.getConstraintViolations(Collection<?> objects, Validator validator, Class<?>... groups)
    Validates each element in the collection using the provided validator and returns structured constraint violations.
    static Set<ConstraintViolation<?>>
    ValidationUtils.getConstraintViolations(Collection<?> objects, Class<?>... groups)
    Validates each element in the collection using the default validator and returns structured constraint violations.
    static <T> Set<ConstraintViolation<T>>
    ValidationUtils.getConstraintViolations(T object, Validator validator, Class<?>... groups)
    Validates the object using the provided validator and returns structured constraint violations with property paths.
    static <T> Set<ConstraintViolation<T>>
    ValidationUtils.getConstraintViolations(T object, Class<?>... groups)
    Validates the object using the default validator and returns structured constraint violations with property paths.
    default <T> Set<ConstraintViolation<T>>
    Validator.getConstraintViolations(T object, Class<?>... groups)
    Validates the given object and returns structured constraint violations, including their property paths, invalid values, messages, and constraint metadata.

  • Uses of ConstraintViolation in io.fluxzero.sdk.tracking.handling.validation.jakarta

    Methods in io.fluxzero.sdk.tracking.handling.validation.jakarta that return types with arguments of type ConstraintViolation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> Set<ConstraintViolation<T>>
    DefaultJakartaValidator.getConstraintViolations(T object, Class<?>... groups)
    Validates a bean instance and returns raw constraint violations.
